General.Name: Sanxun Holdings Group Ltd
General.Description: Sanxun Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development business in the People's Republic of China. The company develops and sells residential properties. It is also involved in trading business. Sanxun Holdings Group Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Hefei, the People's Republic of China. Sanxun Holdings Group Limited is a subsidiary of Q Kun Ltd.
General.Address: Anhui Modern Intelligent Comprehensive T, Hefei, China
